# 🌿 Eden Framework Documentation

Welcome to the **Eden Framework** documentation. This is your comprehensive guide to mastering Eden—a high-performance, asynchronous Python web framework built for modular excellence.

---

## 🎓 The Journey: Zero to Production

Follow this complete, step-by-step journey to build a production-grade, multi-tenant application from the ground up.

```{toctree}
:maxdepth: 1

introduction
getting_started
data_forge_orm
routing_and_navigation
templating_and_components
forms_and_validation
authentication_security
multi_tenancy_isolation
middleware_and_events
admin_panel
background_tasks
websockets_realtime
caching
storage_automation
communications_engine
payments
deployment
api_reference
```

---

## 🛰️ Architecture Overview

Eden is architected around the principle of **Modular Excellence**. Every component, from the core ASGI heart to the Data Forge, is designed to be isolated yet perfectly synchronized.

| Feature | Component | Eden implementation |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Routing** | `Resource` | Automatic class-based routing |
| **Modeling** | `Model` | Pydantic-powered ORM |
| **Logic** | `Eden` | The central application engine |
| **Auth** | `RBAC` | Enterprise-grade access control |
| **UI** | `Template` | Jinja2, Forms, Components |
| **Admin** | `AdminPanel` | Auto-generated admin interface |
| **Integrations** | `Service` | Payments, Storage, Email, Tasks |

---

## Getting Started

### Installation

```bash
npx eden new colony_manager
cd colony_manager
uv run eden run
```

### Your First App

```python
from eden import Eden

app = Eden(title="My App")

@app.get("/")
async def hello():
    return {"message": "Hello, Eden!"}

app.run()
```

---

## Key Features

- **Async-First**: Built for maximum throughput with standard ASGI support.
- **Type Safety**: Full Pydantic v2 integration for schema-driven development.
- **Database**: SQLAlchemy 2.0 with first-class async support and multi-tenancy.
- **Security**: Built-in RBAC, CSRF protection, and Argon2 password hashing.

---

## Community & Support

- **GitHub**: [Eden on GitHub](https://github.com/eden-framework/eden)
- **Issues**: [Support & Issues](https://github.com/eden-framework/eden/issues)
